title: hiirosakura
description: Client-side auxiliary mods and GUI-based item editor
body: # **HiiroSakura Mod** ![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e1e5837bcad6dfff4e89e77bb250037f9c54345.png) ![Hiirosakura](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/hiirosakura?label=Version&color=FF69B4) **HiiroSakura** is a versatile mod dedicated to enhancing the Minecraft gaming experience. It offers gameplay enhancements, chat feature expansions, rendering optimizations, and a flexible configuration management interface. ## 📦 **Dependencies** [IbukiGourd](https://modrinth.com/mod/ibukigourd) ![ibukigourd](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/ibukigourd?label=Modrinth&color=8647B3) All features of the mod are disabled by default. **Open the mod settings interface**: - Press the shortcut **H + S**. - Adjust mod settings in the interface to enable or disable different features. ## ✨ **Main Features** ### **1. Rendering Modifications** - Always render blocks (barriers, light sources). - Disable text obfuscation effects. - Disable sidebar scoreboards. - Gamma value override. - Render TNT and creeper fuse timers. - Handheld Item Additional Information Rendering. - Render item drop information. ### **2. Gameplay Enhancements** - Auto planting. - Item use intercept. - Block destruction protection. - Automatic chestplate and Elytra switching. - Auto respawn. - Sound effect filtering. - Switch client-side camera entity. ### **3. Chat Feature Extensions** - **Message filtering**. - **Message injection**. - **Chat bubbles**. ## 🌟 **Custom Tasks** - Support sending messages, commands, or writing `Jexl` for custom tasks. - Execute tasks quickly via hotkeys or a Gui execution interface. ## 📌 **Event Subscription** Provides support for subscribing to multiple types of events: - **Player events** (chat, game login, logout, etc.). - **World events** (block destruction, etc.). Events can trigger multiple actions: - **Send messages**. - **Execute commands**. - **Run scripts**. - **Trigger custom tasks**. ### 🌟 **Enjoy a More Elegant Minecraft Gaming Experience!**
